issues.title: Advanced RAG Component Support
issues.body:
is there a plan for "Advanced RAG Component Support"?
such as "Semantic Chunking", "Reranker Model" etc..

comments.body: yes, we are looking into this. There are other issues under the RAG label that duplicate this request.

@markpollack Why was this issue closed as completed? There is no open issue regarding advanced chunking strategies like 'semantic chunking' or 'dynamic section retrieval', and up to now, neither Spring AI nor langchain4j supports them.
